name: likha-load-tests
description: k6 load tests for Likha LMS server

scripts.test:baseline: mkdir -p reports/baseline && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/baseline.js
scripts.test:stress: mkdir -p reports/stress && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/stress.js
scripts.test:classroom: mkdir -p reports/classroom-mix && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/classroom-mix.js
scripts.test:exam: mkdir -p reports/exam-surge && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/exam-surge.js
scripts.test:delta: mkdir -p reports/delta-sync && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/delta-sync.js
scripts.test:grading: mkdir -p reports/teacher-grading && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/teacher-grading.js
scripts.test:all-endpoints: mkdir -p reports/get-all-endpoints && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/get-all-endpoints.js
scripts.test:all-endpoints-quick: mkdir -p reports/get-all-endpoints-quick && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/get-all-endpoints-quick.js
scripts.test:all: pnpm build && export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && k6 run dist/baseline.js && k6 run dist/stress.js
scripts.reports:list: find reports -name '*.json' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'No reports found'
